# `Agent` manifest

Reference for `kind: Agent` (apiVersion `vais.agents/v1`). Authoring schema: [`Agent.schema.json`](../schemas/Agent.schema.json).

## Example

```yaml
apiVersion: vais.agents/v1
kind: Agent
metadata:
  id: example-agent
  version: "1.0"
  description: Example declarative agent.
spec:
  handler:
    typeName: declarative
  protocols: []
  tools: []
  model:
    provider: openai
    id: gpt-4.1
  systemPrompt:
    inline: You are a helpful assistant.
  agentMode: ToolCalling
```
